extensionDescription.message: Neurodiversity-friendly translator with free and OpenAI-compatible engines, replace/bilingual/click modes, ND glossary, and reading aids.

popup_engine_free_tip.message: Free translation powered by Google. May be less accurate than LLM API.

popup_engine_llm_tip.message: Requires API key configured in Advanced Settings.

popup_context_invalidated.message: Extension context invalidated. Please reload the extension.

popup_script_unavailable.message: Content script unavailable. Please refresh the page.

popup_page_not_supported.message: This page does not support this operation

options_subtitle.message: Configure translation preferences and API settings

options_api_endpoint_help.message: Enter an OpenAI-compatible API endpoint URL. Leave blank to use free Google Translate.

options_api_key_help.message: API key is stored securely in browser sync storage. Leave blank to use free Google Translate.

options_model_help.message: Select a model, or use a custom model name below

options_custom_model_inactive_help.message: Using selected model: "{MODEL}" (enter a custom model name to override)

options_format_desc_enabled.message: Reading format settings below will be applied to new pages after saving.

options_format_desc_disabled.message: New pages will retain original website formatting. Adjust any reading format and save to re-enable.

options_format_cleared.message: Reading formats cleared. New pages will retain original styles.

options_dyslexic_font_help.message: Replace English fonts with OpenDyslexic, designed for dyslexic readers with heavier bottoms to reduce letter-flipping.

options_chinese_font_help.message: Replace Chinese fonts with LXGW WenKai, featuring clear glyphs suitable for dyslexic readers. Loaded via CDN, requires internet.

options_bionic_reading_help.message: Bold the first half of each English word, creating visual anchors to guide eye movement.

options_dim_help.message: Fade the non-bold part of words to make visual anchors more prominent.

options_sentence_break_help.message: Split text by punctuation marks, placing each sentence on its own line to reduce reading pressure from long paragraphs.

options_reset_spacing_help.message: Only restores recommended values on this page. To stop applying formats to new pages, use "Clear & Keep Disabled" above.

options_reading_speed_help.message: Text-to-speech reading speed. Above 3x will auto-enable silent mode (highlight only, no audio).

options_reading_guide_help.message: Reading Guide is controlled via the page bottom toolbar. Set reading preferences here.

options_smart_content_help.message: Uses Mozilla Readability algorithm to automatically identify main content areas. Enabled by default. When disabled, traditional element identification is used.

options_input_field_help.message: Press a hotkey in any text input field to trigger translation. Results appear in a popup near the input field.

options_trigger_key_help.message: Select the key to trigger translation in input fields. F2 is recommended as websites rarely use it.

options_trigger_modifiers_help.message: Optional modifier keys to combine with the trigger key (e.g., Ctrl+F2).

options_auto_detect_lang.message: Auto-detect page language for input field translation

options_auto_detect_lang_help.message: When enabled, the system detects the webpage's language and translates input text to that language.

options_default_target_lang_help.message: Fallback language used when page language detection fails or input language matches page language.

options_exclude_selectors_help.message: Shows all exclude selectors. Default exclusions are built-in and displayed at top. Add custom selectors after the user comment line.

options_concurrency_help.message: Number of paragraphs to translate simultaneously. Higher values are faster but hit API limits more aggressively.

options_retry_help.message: Number of retry attempts when translation fails.

options_smart_batching_help.message: Uses token-based intelligent batching to minimize API calls and maximize efficiency. When disabled, paragraphs are translated and displayed one at a time.

options_glossary_help.message: Force LLM to use standardized translations for neurodiversity terminology.

options_correction_help.message: After translation, locally replace terms in the output. Useful for free translation engine which cannot accept glossary injection.

options_reset_confirm.message: Are you sure you want to restore all settings to defaults? This cannot be undone.

options_interface_lang_help.message: Choose the display language for the extension interface. Changes take effect immediately.
